name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyWritheHelper.Lean2BlendFactor
summary: Shoulder desired lean2 with shoulderLean2 angle blend factor. Set it to 0 to use original shoulder withe desired lean2 angle for shoulders. Note that onFire has to be set to true for this parameter to take any effect.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
